Headline - Eurostile LT

.your-style {
    font-family: 'HamburgSud Headline';
    font-style: normal;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-size: 80px;
    line-height: 80px;
}

Display 5

Headline - Eurostile LT

.your-style {
    font-family: 'HamburgSud Headline';
    font-style: normal;
    font-weight: 300;
    font-size: 50px;
    line-height: 56px;
}

Display 1 (Demi)

Text - Helvetica Now Text

.your-style {
    font-family: 'HamburgSud Text';
    font-style: normal;
    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 24px;
}

Body Text Default (Regular)

Text - Helvetica Now Text

.your-style {
    font-family: 'HamburgSud Text';
    font-style: normal;
    font-weight: 500;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 24px;
}

Text - Helvetica Now Text

.your-style {
    font-family: 'HamburgSud Text';
    font-style: normal;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 16px;
    line-height: 24px;
}

Text - Helvetica Now Text

    font-weight: 400;
    font-size: 14px;
    line-height: 20px;
